home.title: Velluto StradaPro | Ultra High Contrast Road Cycling Glasses

top_geo_gaps: No Article/BlogPosting structured data on blog posts — AI engines cannot extract author, date, or article entity signals for citation
Blog index page has zero meta description, eliminating the concise summary snippet AI answer engines pull for sourcing
No FAQ/Q&A schema on collection or blog article pages — definitional Q&A blocks are a primary citation trigger for AI overviews
Sample article HTML was empty/truncated — likely missing sourceable answer blocks (e.g. 'What are the best road cycling glasses?') with direct, citable one-paragraph answers
No comparison tables detected — AI engines heavily favour structured feature/spec comparisons when answering product research queries
Entity clarity is weak: brand 'Velluto' and product 'StradaPro' lack linked entity definitions (e.g. no schema 'brand', 'manufacturer', or sameAs URIs to Wikidata/Google KG)
No visible freshness signals (datePublished / dateModified) on articles — AI engines deprioritise uncdated content as potentially stale
No external citations or authoritative references within content — AI engines favour content that itself cites credible sources (studies, standards, athlete endorsements)
top_seo_fixes: Add meta description to blog index page (currently 0 chars) — this blocks snippet generation across the entire magazine section
Fix missing hreflang pt-PT on all three audited pages — current pt tag without region qualifier can cause hreflang validation errors and cannibalize Portuguese-region rankings
Expand collection page meta description from 93 chars to 140-155 chars with primary keyword + differentiating value proposition
Add Product or ItemList structured data to the collection page — currently only BreadcrumbList/Org schema present, missing price, availability, and review signals
Collection page title (33 chars) is under-optimised — expand to ~55 chars incorporating intent keywords e.g. 'Best Road Cycling Glasses | Velluto StradaPro'
Implement Article/BlogPosting schema on every blog post with author (Person), datePublished, dateModified, image, and publisher fields
Audit the 61 homepage images for descriptive (not just non-empty) alt text — keyword-relevant alt text improves image search and entity association
quick_wins: Add a 2-3 sentence 'TL;DR answer block' at the top of each blog article (e.g. 'StradaPro glasses use high-contrast lens technology to...') — this single change most directly increases AI citation probability
Write and publish the missing blog index meta description (~150 chars) in Shopify theme settings — 5-minute fix that restores snippet eligibility for the entire magazine
Add FAQPage schema to the homepage (schema types already include Answer/Question/FAQPage — verify these are rendering correctly and expand to 5+ Q&A pairs targeting cyclist purchase-intent queries)
Insert a lens comparison table (contrast level, light conditions, VLT%) into at least one cornerstone blog article — tables are parsed and quoted directly by Perplexity and ChatGPT
Add datePublished and dateModified meta tags + Article schema to blog posts to signal freshness to Google AI Overviews
Add sameAs property to Organization schema pointing to brand social profiles and any Wikidata entry to strengthen entity disambiguation
